title: Plan a Visit
summary: Downtown Syracuse Foundation promotional guide encouraging visitors to use multiple transportation modes including walking, biking (via Empire State Trail), driving (with affordable parking), and public transit (Centro Bus Service). Content positions downtown as accessible and easy to navigate across all mobility options.

political_signal.description: Content reflects municipal priority to position downtown as multimodal-accessible destination; aligns with sustainability and vision-zero adjacent goals through promotion of alternative transportation modes.

processing_notes: Article is promotional content from Downtown Syracuse Foundation website, not municipal government announcement
No budget, procurement, or policy decisions documented
Accessibility features mentioned (Alt+1 screen reader mode) indicate web accessibility consideration
External entity Centro Bus Service mentioned; no municipal department explicitly referenced
